top_signals.title: Chairman Comer launches congressional probe into insider trading on Kalshi, Polymarket
top_signals.summary: Congress is ramping up pressure on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket over concerns of insider trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Investec Eyes EU Bounty
top_signals.summary: Investec has applied for Ireland banking license as it seeks to boost its presence in Europe, and tap one of the world’s largest financial systems. Group CEO Fani Titi spoke to Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja from London. (Source: Bloomberg)
